title: Why did the plane turn back?

meanings.usage: 指飞机从起飞到降落的旅程
描述人感到恐惧的状态
在飞机、火车等交通工具上服务的人员
对某事有兴趣想要知道更多
表示做事非常仔细、完整
飞机起飞和降落的场所
描述令人不舒服的体验
物体或人从底部到顶部的距离
描述人镇定、不慌张的状态
on board表示在船上或飞机上
表示有好运气或好的结果

phrases.usage: 表示过去习惯性的动作或状态，现在已不再如此

examples.en: I used to travel by air a great deal when I was a boy.
examples.zh: 我小时候经常乘飞机旅行。

examples.en: My parents used to live in South America.
examples.zh: 我父母过去住在南美洲。

examples.en: A flight attendant would take charge of me.
I am used to travelling by air.
Only on one occasion have I ever felt frightened.
examples.zh: 我只曾在一次感到害怕。

examples.en: The plane was slowly gaining height.
The plane suddenly turned round and flew back to the airport.
examples.zh: 飞机突然掉头飞回机场。

examples.en: A flight attendant told us to keep calm.
examples.zh: 乘务员告诉我们保持冷静。

examples.en: Get off the plane quietly as soon as it had touched down.
examples.zh: 飞机一着陆就安静地下飞机。
飞机上的每个人都很担心。

examples.en: We were curious to find out what had happened.
examples.zh: 我们好奇想知道发生了什么事。

grammar.title: used to 的用法
grammar.definition: used to表示过去经常发生的动作或存在的状态，而现在不再如此
grammar.structure: 主语 + used to + 动词原形
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去的习惯、状态，与现在形成对比

examples.en: I used to travel by air a great deal.
examples.zh: 我过去经常乘飞机旅行。

examples.en: My parents used to live in South America.
examples.zh: 我父母过去住在南美洲。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 + when + 一般过去时
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻正在进行的动作被另一突然发生的动作打断
grammar.structure: 过去进行时 + when + 一般过去时
grammar.usage: when引导的短句通常表示突发情况，when可理解为'就在这时'

examples.en: We were flying low over the city when the plane suddenly turned round.
examples.zh: 我们正在城市上空低飞，这时飞机突然掉头。

examples.en: I was reading a book when the phone rang.
examples.zh: 我正在看书，突然电话响了。

grammar.title: 过去完成时
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去的过去，常与after、before、when等连用，或用于宾语从句中

examples.en: The police had been told that a bomb had been planted.
examples.zh: 警察已被告知飞机上被安置了一颗炸弹。

examples.en: After we had landed, the plane was searched.
examples.zh: 我们降落之后，飞机被彻底搜查。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + used to + 动词原形

original.en: I used to travel by air a great deal.
original.zh: 我过去经常乘飞机旅行。

imitations.en: She used to live in Paris.
He used to smoke, but now he doesn't.
imitations.zh: 他过去抽烟，但现在不抽了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + be used to + doing sth

original.en: I am used to travelling by air.

imitations.en: She is used to getting up early.
They are used to living in a big city.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 过去进行时 + when + 一般过去时

original.en: We were flying low over the city and slowly gaining height, when the plane suddenly turned round.
original.zh: 我们正在城市上空低飞并缓慢爬升，突然飞机掉头了。

imitations.en: I was walking home when it started to rain.
imitations.zh: 我正走回家，突然开始下雨了。

imitations.en: She was cooking dinner when the doorbell rang.
imitations.zh: 她正在做晚饭，突然门铃响了。

original.en: After we had landed, the plane was searched thoroughly.
original.zh: 我们降落之后，飞机被彻底搜查。

imitations.en: After I had finished my homework, I watched TV.
imitations.zh: 我完成作业之后看了电视。

imitations.en: After he had left, we started to clean the room.
imitations.zh: 他离开之后，我们开始打扫房间。
